summary: Executed backend + frontend regression for enhancement scope (currency, editable landing content, weekly operational view, footer replacement). All requested flows validated successfully on public URL.
critical_code_review_comments: frontend/src/App.js is very large (~1700+ lines). Split into feature modules (landing/booking/admin sections) to improve maintainability and reduce regression risk.
seed_data_creation: Created test bookings via public booking flow during API/UI regression with unique test emails.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Enhancement regression added in backend pytest: validates admin currency + landing content settings, public config sync, email log currency symbol, and operational view data shape. UI checks confirmed footer in public/admin layouts, no floating Made with Emergent text, editable landing content reflects dynamically, capacity weekly operational cards render, and booking flow remains functional.
rca of the issue: No blocking defect found in requested enhancement scope. Earlier UI observation of stale currency display was due test-state carryover from prior interactive runs; direct validation confirmed currency persistence and frontend rendering update when settings are saved.
